title: Zuluk
overview: Once his childhood friend’s younger brother Chaitanya, who is photographer, comes in the city to cover Aru's programme. When they meet, Utkarsh asks him to stay with his family. Chaitanya has a good taste for art as he appreciates Aru's singing skills which are not so encouraged by busy man Utkarsh. But soon the situation gets complicated as Chaitanya feels that his friendship with Aru is going to create problems in Utkarsh's family.
